editorial_note: First experimental confirmation of Kardar-Parisi-Zhang universality in two spatial dimensions, four years after the 1D result; bridges a 40-year gap between the 1986 theory and laboratory measurement.

related_articles.context: Adjacent condensed-matter result that joins quantum-system manipulation with statistical-mechanics universality
Recent experimental confirmation of a universality-class prediction in a different 2D condensed-matter platform
